etiqueta: Email of the agent that of the agent involved in the last WhatsApp message sent from the HubSpot UI
descripcion: Email of the agent that sent the last message from the HubSpot UI. It does not include messages sent from the phone or WhatsApp Web

etiqueta: Date of the last WhatsApp message sent from the HubSpot UI
descripcion: Date of the last message sent to a contact from the HubSpot UI. It does not include messages sent from the phone or WhatsApp Web

etiqueta: Email of the agent that of the agent involved in the last WhatsApp conversation synced
descripcion: Email of the agent involved in the last WhatsApp conversation logged in HubSpot. This includes both incoming and outgoing messages

etiqueta: Date of the last WhatsApp conversation synced
descripcion: Date of the last time the sync process run and found new messages for this contact. This includes both incoming and outgoing messages

etiqueta: Full JSON payload of the last WhatsApp conversation synced
descripcion: All data of the event recorded the last time the sync process run and found new messages for this contact. This includes both incoming and outgoing messages
if checked all WhatsApp conversations will be synced through WhatHub, if unchecked sync process will skip this contact and buffered messages will be dropped from the cache
